title: Figure 6 from: Shepack A, von May R, Ttito A, Catenazzi A (2016) A new species of Pristimantis (Amphibia, Anura, Craugastoridae) from the foothills of the Andes in Manu National Park, southeastern Peru. ZooKeys 594: 143-164. https://doi.org/10.3897/zookeys.594.8295
author: Shepack, Alexander
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Figure 6 - 
              
                
                  
                     Maximum Likelihood 
                  (ML) phylogeny (best tree) based on the combined dataset (16S ribosomal RNA and COI genes). ML bootstrap values are indicated at each node.
